word: H2113 - זְוָעָה - zᵉvâʻâh - zev-aw-aw' - Be removed

sections.paragraph:
Original: זועה

Transliteration: zevâ‛âh

Phonetic: zev-aw-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. a horror, an object of terror, a trembling, an object of trembling

Origin: from H2111

TWOT entry: 540a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
